questionHtml: Outline how the initial rate of reaction can be determined from the graph in part (c)(i).
markschemeHtml:
«draw a» tangent to the curve at time = 0 ✔

«rate equals» gradient/slope «of the tangent» ✔

 

Accept suitable diagram.
